samples.title: Macaroni and Cheese
steps: Drain noodles and mix with cottage cheese
Layer meat and egg mixture over all noodles
samples.formatted:
Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- ground chuck
- spaghetti sauce
- lasagna noodles
- cottage cheese
- egg
- Mozzarella cheese
- Italian cheese

Instructions:
1. Brown meat and drain
2. Add spaghetti sauce
3. Cook noodles as directed
4. Drain noodles and mix with cottage cheese
5. Put in large baking dish
6. Beat egg with cottage cheese
7. Layer meat and egg mixture over all noodles
8. Top with grated Mozzarella cheese
9. Bake at 350 for 30 minutes

samples.title: Macaroni and Cheese
samples.formatted:
Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- sugar
- oil
- eggs
- carrots
- flour
- baking powder
- cinnamon
- salt
- vanilla
- nuts
- powdered sugar

Instructions:
1. Cream sugar and oil
2. Add eggs and carrots
3. Mix well
4. Sift dry ingredients
5. Add to creamed mixture
6. Add vanilla and nuts
7. Bake at 350 for 20 to 25

samples.title: Macaroni and Cheese
steps: Cook macaroni according to package directions
In a saucepan, melt the butter with the flour, salt and pepper
Stir in the milk and cheese and cook over low heat until cheese is melted
Place the macaroni in a large bowl and pour in the cheese sauce
Butter a casserole dish and line with the macaroni
samples.formatted:
Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- butter
- flour
- salt
- pepper
- macaroni
- milk
- cheese
- egg

Instructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350
2. Cook macaroni according to package directions
3. Drain
4. In a saucepan, melt the butter with the flour, salt and pepper
5. Stir in the milk and cheese and cook over low heat until cheese is melted
6. Place the macaroni in a large bowl and pour in the cheese sauce
7. Butter a casserole dish and line with the macaroni
8. Top with the cheese

samples.title: Macaroni and Cheese
steps: Peel potatoes and cut them into small chunks
Put the peeled potatoes in a large pot and cover with cold water
Melt butter in a large saucepan
Add the flour, salt and pepper and mix well
Add the milk gradually, stirring constantly until thickened
samples.formatted:
Macaroni and Cheese

Ingredients:
- potatoes
- butter
- milk
- flour
- salt
- pepper
- chives

Instructions:
1. Peel potatoes and cut them into small chunks
2. Put the peeled potatoes in a large pot and cover with cold water
3. Bring to a boil
4. Boil until potatoes are done
5. Drain
6. Melt butter in a large saucepan
7. Add the flour, salt and pepper and mix well
8. Add the milk gradually, stirring constantly until thickened
